productDisplayName: Puma Men's Allegra Mid Black Silver Shoe
description: The Allegra is a vibrant mid top action shoe from puma. Street styled to the max with high lacing and extra large touch fastening for a secure Fit, this shoe is also engineered with a breathable AirMesh upper and idCELL midsole, topped off with a low profile rubber sole to make your feet have the best of comfort.Upper Premium leather upper combined with mesh for breathability Synthetic leather formstripe with a shimmery border Central lacing for a customised, snug fit High ankle support with  additional buckled strap for grip Outsole embedded onto the toe box for better shock absorption Midsole Innovative puma midsole in a combination of phylon and EVA that provides better lightweight comfort and cushioning idCell in the heel for added impact protection Outsole Textured non-marking rubber outsole with a pivot point below  the big toe mound for easay 180 degree movement
